question.content: C60 undergoes [2+2]66/66 cycloaddition and forms an orthorhombic layered crystal with ABAB stacking. In one layer, determine how many C atoms of each C60 unit are used to connect with surrounding C60 units. Answer format: a single integer; do not include units, explanatory text, or an equals sign. Answer format: a single integer; write only the number itself, with no units, explanatory text, or equals sign.

step_1.content: Each [2+2]66/66 intermolecular link consumes two C atoms from one C60 unit.
step_1.key_point: One link contributes 2 connected C atoms per C60.

step_3.content: In the layer, one C60 unit connects to four surrounding C60 neighbors through four [2+2] links.
step_3.key_point: Connected neighbor count in one layer is 4.

step_5.content: Total connected C atoms on one C60 unit are 4*2.
step_5.key_point: Multiply link count by atoms per link.
